title: Battle in the Silken Asteroids

{{Quote|It's not looking good, the Empire has located one of our secret asteroid bases. Not even time for reinforcements. There will be no escape for the Rebellion this time.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
A '''battle''' occurred at the [[Silken Asteroids]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] led by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Derliff]] who moved against a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base led by [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]. Dodonna managed to destroy Derliff's forces.

==Prelude==
Around [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="Time" /> the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] established a base in the [[Silken Asteroids]]. It was discovered by [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] belonging to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Derliff]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|The Empire is going to attack!|General Dodonna to the Rebel forces|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
[[File:GB_Silken_02.jpg|left|thumb|X-wings fighting Imperial forces in the Silken Asteroids.]]
The Rebel base's six [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] fended off Derliff's initial attack wave, a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> rallied his forces and used the bases' [[R2-D5]] [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droids]] to construct additional defenses<ref name="Army" /> before taking the battle to Derliff's base and driving out the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Against all odds, we've won again. Congratulations.|Wedge Antilles after the battle|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
With the defeat of the Imperial base, the Rebels won the battle.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Silken Asteroids was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] to the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. It was the [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] Leia campaign's challenge mission. The player has complete freedom in building up the base and the army, although the strategy guide recommends building a large fighter squadron. The objective is to destroy the Imperial base. The mission and thus the battle was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

The strategy guide erroneously refers to the Z-95 Headhunters in the beginning portion of the mission as "X-wings." In addition, the exact amount the player can build regarding the bases, and likewise the Imperial forces' amount, is dependent of the player's actions and game mechanics. However, the guide notes that the player at the beginning has five workers, and that the absolute maximum population is 75, and that the required amount of spacecraft needed to be developed to beat the level is 55.
